title: Invalid product vision brief
durable_vision: ProductOS should become the repo-native PM operating system for sharper judgment and reusable context.
problem_space_summary: The problem space still needs a strategy spine.
solution_direction_summary: Add strategy contracts before deeper discovery expansion.
customer_value_statement: PMs can frame the next bet faster.
business_value_statement: ProductOS becomes easier to trust and buy.
differentiation_statement: Mission, strategy, and downstream artifacts stay linked in-repo.
north_star_definition: Still present, but the metric name is missing.
